title: Big Globe - The Graveyard Compatibility
description: The Graveyard Compatibility so that it is naturally generated in Big Globe
body:
[**Alternative CurseForge Download**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/big-globe-the-graveyard-compatibility)

A compatibility mod/datapack for [The Graveyard (FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) or [The Graveyard (FORGE/NEOFORGE)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-forge), makes all structures generate correctly in [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe)

If you can't locate a structure with /locate, I recommend using mod ([Explorer Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass))

Examples:

Ruins are generated naturally in Big Globe forests
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/775d52eb3682a3dfe6d5c52af1325108449b722d_0.webp)
Small Desert Graveyard It is naturally generated in Big Globe deserts
![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/739e4e5719ee165abd0343d03b5d9450db87f2ed_0.webp)
Haunted House is naturally generated in light and dense forests of Big Globe
![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8e7e2e9df2f0218a586f5d891b85d11bb7fd66_0.webp)
